response:
Sure, here's a response to the email:

Subject: Follow-up on Resume for Administrative & Order Entry Specialist Position

Dear Cory,

I am following up on your resume for the Administrative & Order Entry Specialist position with Kuebler. I would like to discuss the role further and explore if it aligns with your interests. Please let me know a convenient time for you to speak via phone. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,  
Vice President of Sales & Marketing North America
